steps.title: Find the contextual contrast
steps.content: GRB 230307A lasted 200 seconds, but neutron-merger bursts typically last fewer than 2 seconds. The blank labels this 200-second burst as something unusual or atypical for its category.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
an oddity = something strange or unusual — exactly what a 100x-too-long burst is.

A coincidence implies chance alignment, not abnormality. A reprieve is a temporary relief (wrong domain). An incident is just an event (too neutral; doesn't capture the unusualness).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
